# 🥍 Harriton Lacrosse Coaching Hub Instructions

## 📋 General Guidelines

- **Uniformity:** All tactical documents must follow the standard emoji-led sections: 🎯 Overview, 💡 Concepts, ⚙️ Setup, 🏃 Execution, 🧠 Mindset, ✅ Outcomes, 📋 Coaching.
- **Privacy:** NEVER include high school student PII (names, phone numbers, addresses) in this repository. Use jersey numbers or archetypes only.

## 🔄 Mandatory README Sync

- **Rule:** Every time a new tactical page, drill, or strategy is added to the repository, the root [README.md](../README.md) MUST be updated immediately.
- **Navigation:** Group new pages under their respective headers (Drill Catalog, Strategic Foundations, or Special Teams) with a concise 1-sentence description.

## 🛠️ Technical Standards

- **Formatting:** Use `printf` for all file writes to avoid terminal issues with complex characters.
- **Version Control:** Immediately `git add`, `commit`, and `push origin main` after every successful update or set of changes.
